run_order.description: Load the active agent plan from the API.
Load strategy, safety budget, history, notes, signals, and intervention status.
Verify daily/monthly and per-run-type budget before proceeding; trim scope if exceeded.
Verify no critical intervention triggers before proceeding.
Read portfolio, positions, watchlist quotes, and recent orders via Robinhood MCP.
Load standardized market input bundle checklist (quotes, indices, vol proxy, orders, movers).
Review recent news/events from API; ingest summaries when found externally.
For each symbol you will analyze, load prior actions, cooldowns, position, notes, and signals.
Analyze each watchlist/allowed symbol using market inputs, symbol memory, strategy rules, and history.
Call review_equity_order for any would-be live trade; never place unless safety.trading_allowed.
Verify decisions against strategy, safety, cooldowns, freshness, symbol memory, and missing data.
POST completed or failed run with decisions, quotes, usage, and errors.

scoring_rules_extra.rule: Review recent_news and symbol memory news before scoring news component; cite headlines in action_rationale when material.
Every decision must include a clear reason; add review_output for live trade intents when required.
When data is missing, ambiguous, or conflicting, choose hold or skip.
Use cheaper models for signal_response and reconciliation_only; check usage_budget before deep analysis.
